title: Remove and replace electrical units and assemblies

elements.title: Prepare to remove and replace electrical unit and assemblies

pcs.text: Job requirements are determined from workplace instructions1.2 Workplace procedures and manufacturer specifications are accessed and interpreted1.3 Hazards associated with the work are identified and risks are managed 1.4 Tools and equipment are selected and checked for serviceability
